full_text:
Peng Qiu еҪӯз’Ҷ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Peng Qiu (еҪӯз’Ҷ)was born in Beiping. A Confucian scholar who became an adviser to Kong Rong. Peng Qiu was affiliated with Kong Rong.
